title: lazy-tmux: lazy tmux session manager with scrollback restore
excerpt: lazy-tmux restores only the sessions you need, preserves scrollback history, and works instantly.
content_html:
Session manager with scrollback restore. CLI that snapshots tmux sessions with running processes and scrollback and restores them lazily and seamlessly when you select one.

Try lazy-tmux right now: docker run -it --rm alchemmist/lazy-tmux:latest

Demo Preview

A tmux session with a shell, a running top, and a deploying service. We detach, run tmux kill-server to wipe everything, then bring it all back by picking the session in the TUI — the shell's scrollback and the running processes come back intact.

We detach, run tmux kill-server to wipe everything, then bring it all back by picking the session in the TUI — the shell's scrollback and the running processes come back intact.

blocks.html_en: Session manager with scrollback restore. CLI that snapshots tmux sessions with running processes and scrollback and restores them lazily and seamlessly when you select one.

sentences.zh: 具有回滚恢复功能的会话管理器。

sentences.en: CLI that snapshots tmux sessions with running processes and scrollback and restores them lazily and seamlessly when you select one.
sentences.zh: CLI 可对正在运行的进程和回滚的 tmux 会话进行快照，并在您选择一个时延迟且无缝地恢复它们。

blocks.html_en: Try lazy-tmux right now: docker run -it --rm alchemmist/lazy-tmux:latest

sentences.en: Try lazy-tmux right now: docker run -it --rm alchemmist/lazy-tmux:latest
sentences.zh: 现在尝试lazy-tmux： docker run -it --rm alchemmist/lazy-tmux:latest

blocks.html_en: A tmux session with a shell, a running top, and a deploying service. We detach, run tmux kill-server to wipe everything, then bring it all back by picking the session in the TUI — the shell's scrollback and the running processes come back intact.

sentences.en: A tmux session with a shell, a running top, and a deploying service.
sentences.zh: 具有 shell、运行顶部和部署服务的 tmux 会话。

sentences.en: We detach, run tmux kill-server to wipe everything, then bring it all back by picking the session in the TUI — the shell's scrollback and the running processes come back intact.
sentences.zh: 我们分离，运行 tmux Kill-server 来擦除所有内容，然后通过在 TUI 中选择会话将其全部恢复 - shell 的回滚和正在运行的进程完好无损地恢复。

content_html_zh:
具有回滚恢复功能的会话管理器。 CLI 可对正在运行的进程和回滚的 tmux 会话进行快照，并在您选择一个时延迟且无缝地恢复它们。

现在尝试lazy-tmux： docker run -it --rm alchemmist/lazy-tmux:latest

演示预览

具有 shell、运行顶部和部署服务的 tmux 会话。 我们分离，运行 tmux Kill-server 来擦除所有内容，然后通过在 TUI 中选择会话将其全部恢复 - shell 的回滚和正在运行的进程完好无损地恢复。
